title: Royal Denta Gold Medium Toothbrushes Pack of 4, Dual Length Bristle Toothbrush for Interdental Teeth Cleaning, Gold Particles Against Bacteria, Medium Toothbrush for Tartar Removal, Multi-Colour
features: COMPLETE ORAL CARE TOOTHBRUSHES 4-PACK. Reach those hard-to-access areas with our dual-length interdental bristles. The long-length bristles are designed to target tight spaces between the teeth, while the shorter bristles effectively clean the tooth's enamel.

LONG-LASTING MEDIUM TOOTHBRUSH. Unlike the average nylon toothbrush, our interdental toothbrush has been designed using FDA-approved PBT material bristles. These superior bristles are strong and durable and will last twice as long as those on normal brushes.

GOLD-INFUSED TOOTHBRUSH BRISTLES. Our luxury toothbrushes are infused with Gold particles which are proven to eliminate 99.9% of bacteria. Effectively keep plaque and tartar at bay with our toothbrushes.

MEDIUM-STRENGTH ORAL CARE BRUSH. Advanced cleaning brush for teeth and gums. Stimulates blood circulation, massages gums and reduces the risk of decay by eliminating plaque. Keep your mouth clean and fresh for longer with this medium-bristle toothbrush.

COMFORT GRIP TOOTHBRUSH FOR ADULTS. For total control while brushing, our high-quality toothbrushes feature an ergonomic, non-slip grip made of natural rubber. Effective for healthy teeth and gums as well as cleaning braces and dental implants.
